nodes.context: A set of the Crips gang alliance based in Venice, Los Angeles, California.
A gang alliance based in Los Angeles, California.
A gang based in Venice, Los Angeles, California.
A rival gang to the Venice Shoreline Crips.

edges.evidence_quote: The Venice Shoreline Crips ( VSLC ) is a " set " of the Crips gang alliance
edges.context: Venice Shoreline Crips is a subset of the Crips gang alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: the Shorelines warred with rival Culver City 13 after Shoreline cliques were pushed out of the Mar Vista Gardens projects
edges.context: Venice Shoreline Crips fought with Culver City 13 over territory.

edges.evidence_quote: a war broke out between the Shorelines and Venice 13 over control of the Venice drug trade until a cease-fire was arranged between the two gangs
edges.context: Venice Shoreline Crips fought with Venice 13 over drug trade control, then agreed to a cease-fire.
